company.segment_en: Wafer-scale AI compute — the pure-play bet on the training→inference shift, newly public (Nasdaq, May 2026), and TSMC's most wafer-intensive customer per chip
company.segment_zh: 晶圓級 AI 算力 — 押注「訓練→推論」轉移的純標的，2026/5 剛於 Nasdaq 上市，也是台積電「每顆晶片最吃晶圓」的客戶
company.blurb_en: Four pillars on the wafer-scale inference challenger: how Cerebras raises realized compute price (locked-in backlog · latency-as-product · wafer-scale moat) and where the token price-war and margin compression push back · what to watch it with · how much it makes from AI (≈ all of its ~$0.9B revenue, atop a $24.6B backlog) · and how ~100% of it is a single TSMC N5 wafer — uniquely CoWoS/HBM-light.
company.blurb_zh: 對「晶圓級推論挑戰者」的四支柱：Cerebras 怎麼提高已實現算力售價（鎖定的在手訂單 · 速度即產品 · 晶圓級護城河），以及代幣價格戰與毛利壓縮如何反推 · 用什麼資料觀察 · 從 AI 賺多少（≈ 其全部約 $0.9B 營收，背後是 $24.6B 在手訂單）· 以及這一切如何幾乎 100% 是一整片台積電 N5 晶圓 — 且罕見地「不吃 CoWoS／HBM」。

thesis_en: Cerebras is the purest public bet on the training→inference shift. Its Wafer-Scale Engine — a single TSMC 5nm wafer, ~57x the die of an H100 with 44GB of on-chip SRAM — turns LATENCY into the product, posting inference speeds (Llama 8B ~1,800 tok/s) GPUs struggle to match. The bull case is demand, not unit price: a $24.6B RPO backlog (~48x 2025 revenue) plus a >$20B / 750MW OpenAI commitment and DOE/national-lab anchors. The honest tension is the other side of the ledger — realized economics are UNDER PRESSURE (gross margin guided down from 47% to 36-38%), the token price-war is brutal, and 86% of revenue comes from two related UAE entities (MBZUAI + G42). For TSMC, Cerebras is a different shape of customer: it consumes raw advanced-node WAFER AREA at scale yet largely bypasses the CoWoS + HBM bottleneck — so its binding constraint is data-center POWER and its own deployment capex, not packaging.
thesis_zh: Cerebras 是公開市場上對「訓練→推論」轉移最純粹的押注。它的晶圓級引擎（Wafer-Scale Engine）— 一整片台積電 5nm 晶圓、晶粒約是 H100 的 57 倍、片上 44GB SRAM — 把「延遲」變成產品，推出 GPU 難以匹敵的推論速度（Llama 8B 約 1,800 tok/s）。多頭論點在需求、不在單位價格：$24.6B 在手訂單（RPO，約 2025 營收的 48 倍）、加上 OpenAI >$20B／750MW 承諾與 DOE／國家實驗室錨定客戶。誠實的張力在帳本另一邊 — 已實現經濟正受壓（毛利指引從 47% 砍到 36-38%）、代幣價格戰殘酷，且 86% 營收來自兩家阿聯酋關係企業（MBZUAI＋G42）。對台積電而言，Cerebras 是另一種形狀的客戶：它大量消耗先進製程的「晶圓面積」，卻幾乎繞過 CoWoS＋HBM 瓶頸 — 因此它的綁定約束是資料中心電力與自身部署資本支出，而非封裝。
pricing_engine_note_en: the pricing power is locked-in backlog and the latency-as-product premium — not unit-price expansion, where the token price-war and wafer-scale economics are compressing realized margin
pricing_engine_note_zh: 定價權來自鎖定的在手訂單與「速度即產品」溢價 — 而非單位價格擴張；在單位價格端，代幣價格戰與晶圓級經濟正壓縮已實現利潤

pricing_levers.name_en: Locked-in backlog & multi-year commitments (RPO / OpenAI / G42)
pricing_levers.name_zh: 鎖定的在手訂單與多年期承諾（RPO／OpenAI／G42）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Cerebras carries a $24.6B remaining-performance-obligation backlog (~48x 2025 revenue), a >$20B OpenAI master agreement (750MW, options to 2GW) and G42 take-or-pay commitments (~$1.43B, $640M prepaid). These lock forward volume and pricing across multiple years, giving Cerebras pricing visibility and reference points few startups have — the single strongest pillar under its realized price.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: Cerebras 握有 $24.6B 剩餘履約義務（RPO，約 2025 營收的 48 倍）、OpenAI >$20B 主協議（750MW、選擇權至 2GW）與 G42 take-or-pay 承諾（約 $1.43B、已預付 $640M）。這些跨多年鎖定前瞻量與價格，給 Cerebras 少數新創才有的定價能見度與參考點 — 是其已實現價格底下最強的一根支柱。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Cerebras 10-Q RPO/backlog line, OpenAI/G42/AWS contract disclosures, deferred-revenue & prepayment balances.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: Cerebras 10-Q 的 RPO／在手訂單項、OpenAI／G42／AWS 合約揭露、遞延收入與預付款餘額。
pricing_levers.source_en: Cerebras S-1 / 10-Q; OpenAI & G42 deal announcements
pricing_levers.source_zh: Cerebras S-1／10-Q；OpenAI 與 G42 合約公告

pricing_levers.name_zh: 「速度即產品」溢價（延遲就是規格）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Wafer-scale on-chip memory bandwidth (~21 PB/s) lets Cerebras post inference speeds GPUs can't — ~1,800 tok/s on Llama 8B, ~450 tok/s on 70B, ~969 tok/s on 405B. For real-time and agentic workloads where tokens/sec IS the product (Mistral Le Chat, Perplexity, AlphaSense), that latency commands a premium and lets Cerebras price above raw cost-per-token. The edge is strongest on small/mid models and contested on the largest.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 晶圓級片上記憶體頻寬（約 21 PB/s）讓 Cerebras 跑出 GPU 做不到的推論速度 — Llama 8B 約 1,800 tok/s、70B 約 450 tok/s、405B 約 969 tok/s。對「每秒代幣數即產品」的即時與代理（agentic）工作負載（Mistral Le Chat、Perplexity、AlphaSense），這份延遲帶來溢價，讓 Cerebras 能在純成本之上定價。優勢在中小模型最強，在最大模型則受競爭。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Artificial Analysis & Cerebras benchmark tokens/sec, published $/M-token pricing, named latency-sensitive customer wins.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: Artificial Analysis 與 Cerebras 的 tok/s 基準、公布的每百萬代幣價格、延遲敏感客戶的具名勝出。

pricing_levers.name_zh: 晶圓級架構護城河（無直接替代品）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: A 4-trillion-transistor, 900,000-core single wafer with 44GB on-chip SRAM is an architecture no merchant GPU replicates — the whole model fits on-chip, eliminating chip-to-chip overhead. This uniqueness insulates pricing on workloads that need it: there is no second-source to bid Cerebras down, unlike a fungible GPU rack.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 4 兆電晶體、90 萬核心、片上 44GB SRAM 的單一晶圓，是商用 GPU 無法複製的架構 — 整個模型放進片上，消除晶片間通訊負擔。這份獨特性在需要它的工作負載上保護定價：不像可替換的 GPU 機櫃，沒有第二供應商能把 Cerebras 殺價。
pricing_levers.observability_en: WSE-3 spec disclosures, win/loss vs GPU clusters on latency-bound RFPs, competitive teardown commentary.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: WSE-3 規格揭露、延遲綁定標案中對 GPU 叢集的勝負、競品拆解評論。

pricing_levers.name_zh: 錨定合約的可信度（OpenAI／DOE／國家實驗室）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Marquee anchors — the OpenAI master agreement, a DOE 'Genesis Mission' MOU, and deployed CS-3 systems at Sandia / Lawrence Livermore / Los Alamos — act as pricing references and credibility that pull in commercial logos at firmer terms. Validation by the most demanding buyers supports realized price across the rest of the book.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 招牌錨定客戶 — OpenAI 主協議、DOE「Genesis Mission」MOU、以及部署於 Sandia／Lawrence Livermore／Los Alamos 的 CS-3 系統 — 作為定價參考與可信度，以更穩的條件帶進商業客戶。被最挑剔買家驗證，支撐其餘訂單的已實現價格。
pricing_levers.observability_en: New anchor announcements, government/national-lab deployment count, commercial customer logo additions.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 新錨定客戶公告、政府／國家實驗室部署數、新增商業客戶。
pricing_levers.source_en: Cerebras press releases; DOE / national-lab announcements
pricing_levers.source_zh: Cerebras 新聞稿；DOE／國家實驗室公告

pricing_levers.name_zh: 代幣價格戰（已實現價格拖累）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Inference is commoditizing fast: per-token prices have collapsed (~$20 → ~$0.07 per million tokens since 2022) and Gartner projects another ~90% decline by 2030. Cerebras must price its inference cloud against hyperscaler and Groq/SambaNova rates, so even with a speed premium its realized price-per-token is dragged down — a structural headwind on the up-stack levers above.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 推論正快速商品化：每代幣價格崩跌（2022 至今每百萬代幣約 $20 → $0.07），Gartner 預估到 2030 再降約 90%。Cerebras 的推論雲必須對齊雲端巨頭與 Groq／SambaNova 的價格，因此即便有速度溢價，其每代幣已實現價格仍被往下拖 — 是上述上移槓桿之上的結構性逆風。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Published $/M-token across providers, Cerebras Inference price changes, Stanford AI Index cost-decline series.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 各供應商公布的每百萬代幣價格、Cerebras Inference 價格變動、史丹佛 AI Index 成本下降序列。
pricing_levers.source_en: Provider pricing pages; Stanford AI Index 2025
pricing_levers.source_zh: 各供應商定價頁；史丹佛 AI Index 2025

pricing_levers.name_zh: 晶圓級單位經濟壓縮（已實現利潤拖累）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: The Q1 2026 print guided gross margin DOWN from 46.5% to 36-38% (full-year 38-41%, operating margin (28-32%)). Wafer-scale uses enormous silicon area per model (a 70B model reportedly spans multiple wafers), and the backlog ramp is gated by data-center power and Cerebras's own deployment capex — so as volume scales, realized economics per unit of compute are under pressure, not expanding.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 2026 Q1 財報把毛利指引從 46.5% 砍到 36-38%（全年 38-41%、營益率 (28-32%)）。晶圓級每個模型吃下巨量矽面積（一個 70B 模型據報需跨多片晶圓），且在手訂單放量受資料中心電力與 Cerebras 自身部署資本支出制約 — 因此隨量擴張，每單位算力的已實現經濟是受壓、而非擴張。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Quarterly gross-margin actuals vs guide, deployment capex & power commentary, utilization of installed CS-3 fleet.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 每季毛利實績 vs 指引、部署資本支出與電力評論、已裝機 CS-3 機隊的利用率。
pricing_levers.source_en: Cerebras Q1 2026 results & guidance; earnings call
pricing_levers.source_zh: Cerebras 2026 Q1 財報與指引；法說會

data_sources.what_en: Revenue, gross margin, RPO/backlog, customer concentration (MBZUAI/G42), deferred revenue — the hard floor under every pillar. Newly public, so history is short.
data_sources.what_zh: 營收、毛利、RPO／在手訂單、客戶集中度（MBZUAI／G42）、遞延收入 — 各支柱的硬底。剛上市，歷史尚短。

data_sources.name_zh: Cerebras 法說會與投資人關係
data_sources.what_en: Guided core revenue & gross-margin trajectory, OpenAI / AWS / DOE deal commentary, deployment & power constraints — the swing factors on backlog conversion.
data_sources.what_zh: 指引的核心營收與毛利軌跡、OpenAI／AWS／DOE 合約評論、部署與電力約束 — 在手訂單轉換的擺盪因子。

data_sources.name_zh: CBRS 股價（Nasdaq）＋分析師目標價
data_sources.what_en: Live price, market cap, P/S vs NVDA/AVGO, consensus target (~$299) and lockup calendar — the market's read on backlog-conversion odds. Sentiment context, kept OUT of the pricing-power score.
data_sources.what_zh: 即時價格、市值、P/S vs NVDA／AVGO、共識目標價（約 $299）與解禁時程 — 市場對在手訂單轉換機率的判讀。屬情緒情境，刻意排除在定價權分數外。

data_sources.name_zh: 推論基準（Artificial Analysis、Cerebras 部落格）
data_sources.what_en: Independent tokens/sec and $/M-token across models — the cross-check on the latency-as-product lever vs Groq / SambaNova / NVIDIA.
data_sources.what_zh: 跨模型的獨立 tok/s 與每百萬代幣價格 — 對「速度即產品」槓桿、相對 Groq／SambaNova／NVIDIA 的交叉驗證。

data_sources.name_zh: 台積電營收與先進製程揭露
data_sources.what_en: N5/N3 wafer mix and capacity — the raw wafer supply behind every WSE; note Cerebras is wafer-heavy but CoWoS-light, unlike NVIDIA/Broadcom.
data_sources.what_zh: N5／N3 晶圓結構與產能 — 每片 WSE 背後的原始晶圓供給；注意 Cerebras 吃晶圓但少用 CoWoS，與 NVIDIA／Broadcom 不同。

data_sources.name_en: Customer-concentration & anchor disclosures (G42 / MBZUAI / OpenAI / DOE)
data_sources.name_zh: 客戶集中度與錨定揭露（G42／MBZUAI／OpenAI／DOE）
data_sources.what_en: Related-party revenue share (~86% UAE), OpenAI MRA & warrant terms, DOE/national-lab deployments — the demand anchors AND the concentration risk.
data_sources.what_zh: 關係人營收占比（約 86% 阿聯酋）、OpenAI 主協議與認股權條件、DOE／國家實驗室部署 — 既是需求錨定，也是集中度風險。

data_sources.what_en: Independent estimates of wafer-scale cost-per-token and silicon-area-per-model — the cross-check on the margin-compression lever.
data_sources.what_zh: 晶圓級每代幣成本與每模型矽面積的獨立估計 — 對毛利壓縮槓桿的交叉驗證。

data_sources.name_zh: AI 推論市場與代幣價格追蹤
data_sources.what_en: Inference market size (~$106B 2025 → ~$255B 2030 EST), inference share of AI compute (~2/3 by 2026), and token-price indices — the demand backdrop and the price-war.
data_sources.what_zh: 推論市場規模（約 $106B 2025 → 約 $255B 2030 EST）、推論占 AI 算力比重（2026 約 2/3）、代幣價格指數 — 需求背景與價格戰。

benefit_estimates.method_en: Total revenue run-rate (guided FY2026 core revenue)
benefit_estimates.method_zh: 總營收年化（指引 FY2026 核心營收）
benefit_estimates.basis_en: Cerebras is a pure-play AI compute company, so total revenue ≈ AI benefit. 2025 revenue was $510M (+76%); Q1 2026 was $193.4M (+92%); management guides FY2026 core revenue to ~$855-865M. This is a disclosed/guided figure — only the annualization is a projection. For the demand-side coverage view see /payback; for the inference-share backdrop see /compute.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: Cerebras 是純 AI 算力公司，故總營收 ≈ AI 利益。2025 營收 $510M（+76%）；2026 Q1 為 $193.4M（+92%）；管理層指引 FY2026 核心營收約 $855-865M。此為揭露／指引值 — 唯一推估是年化。需求端覆蓋率視角見 /payback；推論占比背景見 /compute。

benefit_estimates.method_zh: 在手訂單（剩餘履約義務 RPO）
benefit_estimates.basis_en: S-1 discloses $24.6B of RPO — ~48x 2025 revenue. Recognition is back-loaded: ~15% (~$3.7B) through 2027, ~43% (~$10.6B) in 2028-2029, ~42% after. This is contracted future revenue, NOT an annual figure — backlog conversion timing (gated by power & deployment) is the central swing factor. Cancellability and related-party terms are the caveats.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: S-1 揭露 $24.6B 的 RPO — 約 2025 營收的 48 倍。認列後段集中：到 2027 約 15%（約 $3.7B）、2028-2029 約 43%（約 $10.6B）、其後約 42%。這是已簽約的未來營收、非年度數字 — 在手訂單的轉換時點（受電力與部署制約）是核心擺盪因子。可取消性與關係人條件是但書。

benefit_estimates.basis_en: The Dec 2025 OpenAI master agreement is reported at >$20B for 750MW of capacity (options to 2GW), bundled with a warrant to OpenAI (~33.4M shares) and a $1B working-capital loan to Cerebras. The headline TCV is disclosed-ish but figure precision and vesting milestones (incl. a $40B market-cap trigger) make the realized value an estimate.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: 2025/12 的 OpenAI 主協議報導 >$20B、對應 750MW 產能（選擇權至 2GW），並綁定給 OpenAI 的認股權（約 33.4M 股）與給 Cerebras 的 $1B 營運資金貸款。頭條 TCV 大致揭露，但金額精度與行權里程碑（含 $40B 市值門檻）使已實現價值仍屬估計。

benefit_disclosure_en: Cerebras reports total revenue directly and it ≈ AI benefit (a pure-play). The headline is the guided ~$0.86B FY2026 core run-rate; the $24.6B RPO backlog and >$20B OpenAI commitment are disclosed CONTRACTED figures, not annual revenue — backlog-conversion timing is the swing factor, and 86% of revenue is two related UAE entities.
benefit_disclosure_zh: Cerebras 直接揭露總營收、且 ≈ AI 利益（純標的）。頭條為指引的約 $0.86B FY2026 核心年化；$24.6B RPO 在手訂單與 >$20B OpenAI 承諾是已揭露的「已簽約」數字、非年度營收 — 在手訂單轉換時點是擺盪因子，且 86% 營收來自兩家阿聯酋關係企業。

silicon_chain.role_en: The product = one full TSMC wafer (training + inference)
silicon_chain.role_zh: 產品本身＝一整片台積電晶圓（訓練＋推論）
silicon_chain.note_en: 4T transistors, 900K cores, 44GB on-chip SRAM on a 46,225mm² die — ~57x an H100. The entire chip is a single TSMC N5 wafer: the most wafer-intensive product TSMC builds per unit.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 4 兆電晶體、90 萬核心、46,225mm² 晶粒上 44GB 片上 SRAM — 約 H100 的 57 倍。整顆晶片就是一整片台積電 N5 晶圓：台積電「每顆最吃晶圓」的產品。

silicon_chain.role_en: Deployed appliance — power, cooling, I/O around the wafer
silicon_chain.role_zh: 部署整機 — 晶圓外的電力、散熱、I/O
silicon_chain.note_en: The shippable unit. Its constraint is data-center POWER and cooling, not packaging — the very thing gating backlog conversion and compressing margins.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 可出貨單位。其約束是資料中心電力與散熱、而非封裝 — 正是卡住在手訂單轉換、壓縮毛利的那個變數。

silicon_chain.note_en: The roadmap pushes Cerebras onto TSMC's most advanced node — deepening leading-edge wafer dependence as it scales. Node/timing is industry-attributed.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 路線圖把 Cerebras 推上台積電最先進節點 — 隨擴張加深對先進製程晶圓的依賴。節點／時程為產業歸因。

silicon_chain.role_en: Streams model weights to the wafer (disaggregated memory)
silicon_chain.role_zh: 把模型權重串流到晶圓（解耦記憶體）
silicon_chain.note_en: Disaggregated DRAM appliance that feeds weights — this is how Cerebras sidesteps HBM: commodity DRAM + streaming instead of HBM stacks + CoWoS.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 餵入權重的解耦 DRAM 整機 — 這正是 Cerebras 繞過 HBM 的方式：商品 DRAM＋串流，取代 HBM 堆疊＋CoWoS。

silicon_chain.role_en: Links multiple CS-3 into a cluster
silicon_chain.role_zh: 把多台 CS-3 連成叢集
silicon_chain.note_en: Broadcast/reduce fabric for weight streaming across many wafers — Cerebras's answer to NVLink/InfiniBand scale-out, also on TSMC silicon.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 跨多片晶圓做權重串流的 broadcast/reduce fabric — Cerebras 對 NVLink／InfiniBand scale-out 的解法，同樣跑在台積電矽上。

silicon_chain.accelerator_zh: 晶圓級整合與冗餘核心良率架構
silicon_chain.role_en: What makes a whole-wafer chip yield-able & manufacturable
silicon_chain.role_zh: 讓整片晶圓晶片能量產、可良率化
silicon_chain.note_en: Co-engineered redundancy, power delivery and the wafer-scale process flow with TSMC — the manufacturing moat that makes a single-wafer chip possible at all.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 與台積電共同工程的冗餘、供電與晶圓級製程流程 — 讓「單一晶圓晶片」得以成立的製造護城河。

silicon_summary_en: WSE-3 and the roadmap WSE-4 are full TSMC N5→N3 wafers; MemoryX/SwarmX are TSMC N7. ~100% TSMC — but uniquely CoWoS- and HBM-LIGHT: Cerebras buys raw wafer area, not packaging.
silicon_summary_zh: WSE-3 與路線圖 WSE-4 是整片台積電 N5→N3 晶圓；MemoryX／SwarmX 為台積電 N7。約 100% 台積電 — 但罕見地少用 CoWoS 與 HBM：Cerebras 買的是原始晶圓面積，而非封裝。
tsmc_read_en: Essentially 100% of Cerebras's silicon is fabbed by TSMC — WSE-3 on N5, the WSE-4 roadmap on N3, MemoryX/SwarmX on N7. But Cerebras is a DIFFERENT shape of customer from NVIDIA or Broadcom: its entire product is a single ~46,225mm² wafer (~57x an H100 die), so it consumes raw advanced-node WAFER AREA at extraordinary intensity per unit — yet it largely BYPASSES the CoWoS + HBM bottleneck (on-wafer SRAM + streamed commodity DRAM instead of HBM stacks and chip-to-chip CoWoS). For TSMC that means pure wafer-start demand decoupled from the packaging constraint that gates NVIDIA/Broadcom. As Cerebras converts its $24.6B backlog and the OpenAI 750MW→2GW ramp, that is incremental N5/N3 wafer demand — but its binding constraint is data-center POWER and its own deployment capex, the very thing that just compressed its margins, not CoWoS.
tsmc_read_zh: Cerebras 的矽幾乎 100% 由台積電製造 — WSE-3 用 N5、WSE-4 路線圖用 N3、MemoryX／SwarmX 用 N7。但 Cerebras 是與 NVIDIA 或 Broadcom 不同形狀的客戶：它的整個產品就是一整片約 46,225mm² 的晶圓（約 H100 晶粒的 57 倍），因此每單位以驚人強度消耗先進製程「晶圓面積」 — 卻幾乎繞過 CoWoS＋HBM 瓶頸（片上 SRAM＋串流商品 DRAM，取代 HBM 堆疊與晶片間 CoWoS）。對台積電而言，這是與「卡住 NVIDIA／Broadcom 的封裝約束」脫鉤的純晶圓投片需求。當 Cerebras 轉換 $24.6B 在手訂單與 OpenAI 750MW→2GW 放量，那是增量的 N5／N3 晶圓需求 — 但它的綁定約束是資料中心電力與自身部署資本支出（正是剛壓縮其毛利的那個變數），而非 CoWoS。

cross_links.label_zh: 瓶頸雷達 — 電力才是 Cerebras 的綁定約束（非 CoWoS）；看哪個可交付算力環節卡住成長

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: RPO converts on schedule, the OpenAI 750MW ramp and AWS deal deploy, revenue run-rate clears ~$2-3B, and non-UAE logos cut the MBZUAI+G42 concentration below ~60%.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: RPO 如期轉換，OpenAI 750MW 放量與 AWS 合約落地，營收年化突破約 $2-3B，且非阿聯酋客戶把 MBZUAI＋G42 集中度壓到約 60% 以下。

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: As deployments scale and utilization rises, gross margin recovers from 36-38% back toward 45%+, proving the Q1 compression was transitory ramp cost — not structural price erosion.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 隨部署擴張與利用率上升，毛利從 36-38% 回升至 45%+，證明 Q1 壓縮是過渡性的放量成本 — 而非結構性價格侵蝕。

scenarios_seed.name_en: Power & deployment bottleneck caps the backlog
scenarios_seed.name_zh: 電力與部署瓶頸卡住在手訂單
scenarios_seed.trigger_en: Data-center power and Cerebras's own deployment capex gate conversion: it wins contracts but can't deploy fast enough — revenue slips to 2027+ and margins stay pinned by ramp cost.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 資料中心電力與 Cerebras 自身部署資本支出卡住轉換：贏了合約卻部署不夠快 — 營收遞延到 2027+，毛利被放量成本壓住。

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: The token price-war plus NVIDIA (now owning Groq) Blackwell/Rubin and custom ASICs (OpenAI-Broadcom, TPU, Trainium) match Cerebras's latency at lower cost — the moat narrows and margins stay compressed.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 代幣價格戰，加上 NVIDIA（已收購 Groq）Blackwell/Rubin 與自研 ASIC（OpenAI-Broadcom、TPU、Trainium）以更低成本追上 Cerebras 的延遲 — 護城河收窄、毛利持續受壓。

falsification_seed.en: A UAE anchor (MBZUAI or G42) delays, cancels or is hit by export controls — the ~86% related-party revenue base cracks and the backlog's quality is repriced.
falsification_seed.zh: 一個阿聯酋錨定客戶（MBZUAI 或 G42）延後、取消或遭出口管制 — 約 86% 的關係人營收基礎出現裂縫，在手訂單品質被重新定價。

falsification_seed.en: Gross margin stays below ~40% for several quarters — the 'transitory ramp cost' story is false and wafer-scale economics simply don't scale.
falsification_seed.zh: 毛利連續數季維持在約 40% 以下 — 「過渡性放量成本」說法不成立，晶圓級經濟根本無法規模化。

falsification_seed.en: NVIDIA Rubin / a custom ASIC matches Cerebras tokens/sec at materially lower cost-per-token — the latency-as-product moat fails.
falsification_seed.zh: NVIDIA Rubin／某顆自研 ASIC 以顯著更低的每代幣成本追平 Cerebras 的 tok/s — 「速度即產品」護城河失效。

watch_seed.en: Gross-margin trajectory (Q2 guided 36-38% → recovery or not)
watch_seed.zh: 毛利軌跡（Q2 指引 36-38% → 是否回升）

watch_seed.en: Customer concentration: UAE % of revenue & new non-UAE logos
watch_seed.zh: 客戶集中度：阿聯酋占營收 % 與新增非阿聯酋客戶
RPO／在手訂單轉換與營收認列速度

watch_seed.en: OpenAI milestones (750MW deploy, warrant vesting, $40B mkt-cap trigger)
watch_seed.zh: OpenAI 里程碑（750MW 部署、認股權行權、$40B 市值門檻）

watch_seed.en: CBRS vs analyst targets (~$299 avg) & lockup-expiry calendar
watch_seed.zh: CBRS vs 分析師目標價（均約 $299）與解禁時程

watch_seed.en: Inference benchmarks: Cerebras tok/s vs NVIDIA Rubin / Groq / SambaNova
watch_seed.zh: 推論基準：Cerebras tok/s vs NVIDIA Rubin／Groq／SambaNova

watch_seed.en: Data-center power & deployment capex — the binding constraint
watch_seed.zh: 資料中心電力與部署資本支出 — 綁定約束

blind_spots_en: Newly public (May 2026) — only one quarter of public financials; limited history and a pending lockup expiry that can move the stock.
~86% of revenue is two related UAE entities (MBZUAI + G42); related-party pricing may not reflect arm's-length market rates.
Backlog ($24.6B RPO) conversion timing and cancellability assumptions are uncertain and back-loaded to 2028+.
Inference speed claims (e.g. 'Nx faster than Blackwell') are vendor benchmarks; independent figures vary by model size.
Node/timing for WSE-4 and MemoryX/SwarmX are industry-attributed, not TSMC/Cerebras-confirmed.
Live CBRS/NVDA/TSM proxies are sentiment context, deliberately kept out of the core pricing-power score.
blind_spots_zh: 剛上市（2026/5）— 僅一季公開財報；歷史有限，且即將到來的解禁可能牽動股價。
約 86% 營收來自兩家阿聯酋關係企業（MBZUAI＋G42）；關係人定價未必反映公平市場價。
在手訂單（$24.6B RPO）的轉換時點與可取消性假設不確定，且認列後段集中於 2028+。
推論速度宣稱（如「比 Blackwell 快 N 倍」）為廠商基準；獨立數字隨模型大小而異。
WSE-4 與 MemoryX／SwarmX 的節點／時程為產業歸因，非台積電／Cerebras 確認。
即時 CBRS／NVDA／TSM proxy 為情緒情境，刻意排除在核心定價權分數之外。

live_proxies.name_zh: 台積電（TSM）— 晶圓供給 proxy
